description: A series of employee suicides at Foxconn facilities in China sparked a global outcry regarding labor conditions in Apple's supply chain. The company faced immense pressure to audit its vendors and improve worker welfare standards.

key_events.description: Global media reports detail high suicide rate at Foxconn Shenzhen.
Steve Jobs defends Foxconn, stating it is 'not a sweatshop'.
Foxconn installs safety nets and raises wages significantly.
Fair Labor Association begins independent audit of factories.

calibration_notes: Measures the impact of supply chain ethics on brand perception versus the persistence of product demand.
